title: Founder's Associate (Technical)
key_evidence: Role explicitly builds internal tools + AI workflows USING CLAUDE CODE — a near-exact match to Ryan's career-break work ('Built agents with Claude Code for competitor-intel and growth-experiments').
'Professional coding experience not required but a plus' — the 'Technical' label is NOT a hard SWE gate; it gates on 'comfortable with code & data' + analytical skill, which Ryan can credibly clear.
Works directly with co-founders + CTO, bridges product/ops — classic founder-associate shape Ryan has actually done (Minima FA, first employee 1->30).
Small early-stage, founder-led climate-tech startup => application very likely founder/CTO-read, not ATS keyword-filtered (high screening score).
Lesser-known niche climate-tech company => far lower applicant volume than hot AI brands (high competition score = low competition).
RISK 1 - Domain is clean-energy / heat-pumps / solar, OUTSIDE Ryan's crypto/Web3+AI-tooling domain; no climate credential or passion signal on CV.
RISK 2 - Targets '1-3 years experience' at £40-60k (£55k); Ryan at ~6.4 yrs is seniority/comp-mismatched (overqualified-junior), which can read as a flight-risk and caps conversion.
biggest_lever: Claude-Code-agent-building + genuine founder-associate track record map almost 1:1 to the JD, and a small founder-read pipeline rewards that specificity.
biggest_risk: Climate-tech domain is cold for Ryan and the role is pitched at a 1-3yr / £55k junior band, creating an overqualification + domain-passion gap that a founder may discount.
recency_note: Posted 2026-04-29 (41 days / 5.9wk, source: WebSearch on PitchMeAI/LinkedIn listing). 4-8wk band base G=32, +8 for low-volume niche climate-tech (lesser-known company, founder-read pipeline, no flood) -> G=40. Listing still live on PitchMeAI; no repost or applicant count visible.
